pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to enable compilation for the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 8, failing to utilize Java 21 features and potentially causing compatibility issues with libraries requiring Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Lombok may not support Java 21 bytecode generation or annotation processing, leading to compilation errors or runtime failures.
